title: Convergence
description: Cozy Modpack for building, lore and creativity, with origin skill trees.
body:
![Convergence Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ded358e15f5bd7afe8be27c6d804e36938b0ea6.png)
_<center>This is an origins based modpack, equipped with unlockable origin based skills tree and a cozy modpack designed to encourage building and creativity designed to let you create amazing stories._

_4 GB memory allocation recommended</center>_

## Features

🔵Origins skill trees - 3 origins tracks for each of the 4 origins dimensions, each equipped with a customized skill tree that you unlock the more you progress!

🌌Overhauled dimensions, courtesy of Regions Unexplored, Pyrellium, Better End, End’s Phantasm, and more!

🪑Additional blocks and furniture for decoration and building, like Blockus, Chipped, Cluttered, Nightlights, to name a few.

🐸Critters and Companions: Mods that increase the fauna of minecraft such as Ecologics, Naturalist, Ribbits, Enderman Overhaul, More Mob Variants, ect.

🌽Farmers Delight and various included expansions add more food and cooking opportunities!

⛏️Mythic Metals, MC Dungeons Weapons & Armors add a unique arsenal with diverse effects.

🎨Increased Player creativity and expression with mods such as Joy of Painting, Music Maker Mod, Figura.

## Lore

The four Spheres, (The Earth, The Nether, The End, and the Underdark), once existed close together in something called the Whirl, which is the gap between dimensions and what keeps them separate. 

Travel between these dimensions, while rare, was possible through Portals. These Portals appeared randomly in any Sphere and allowed only a couple people through at a time before disappearing.

One of these Spheres, the Underdark, tried to reach beyond the limits of Portals and into the Whirl. This caused a massive chain of events (the Convergence) leading to the destruction of the Underdark and the isolation of the other three Spheres from the rest of the Whirl.

## Community

Join a close knit community and make content such as streaming or youtube videos!

See you soon! - The Convergence Team
